short_description: Recurring VPN session timeouts on MacBook remote access
description: Root cause analysis for repeated Pulse Secure VPN disconnections experienced by multiple remote staff including chaplaincy team. Timeout occurs at approximately 30-minute inactivity mark. Suspected misconfiguration in session persistence policy on the VPN gateway introduced during the April maintenance window.

short_description: Pastoral Care shared calendar sync failure pattern
description: Investigating root cause of Outlook shared calendar sync failures in the Pastoral Care department following the May email migration to bluffcitymedical.org domain. Affects on-call schedule visibility for chaplaincy staff. Likely a legacy mailbox attribute incompatibility with the new Exchange configuration.

short_description: BCMC SSO MFA loop pattern on re-enrolled devices
description: Known error candidate for MFA authentication loop in the BCMC single sign-on portal. Affects users who have recently re-enrolled devices in Microsoft Authenticator. MFA token validates but session cookie is not written correctly. Root cause traced to a session management bug in the SSO middleware version deployed in February 2026.

short_description: On-call call-forwarding rules lost during PBX maintenance
description: Identifying root cause of telephony call-forwarding rules being inadvertently deleted during routine PBX maintenance. Affected chaplaincy overnight on-call coverage and other department after-hours routing. Post-incident review in progress to establish change validation steps and backup of forwarding rules before maintenance windows.

short_description: MDM push notification failure on iOS devices after profile update
description: Recurring push notification failures on BCMC MDM-enrolled iPads following the May Jamf profile update. Affects secure email app notifications across multiple departments including Pastoral Care. iPhones on the same profile are unaffected. Suspected APNs certificate mismatch in the updated Jamf profile for iPad device class.
